title: Akihito's Infinity Utilities
description: Adds many features related to the Infinity Stones from Marvel
body:
**THIS MOD HAS DEPENDENCIES**

**if you want things to glow then install optifine**

requires: tinkers' construct and mantle
also required: [Dimension Teleport](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/dimension-teleport) (it's only on curseforge)

This mod adds many things like the Infinity Stones and Infinity Gauntlet, full showcase video is embedded below:

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/rmjF7-WAIhU" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Hope you all enjoy it!
